name: Workforce Framework for Cybersecurity (NICE Framework)
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST SP 800-181 Rev 1 (2020) — NICE Cybersecurity Workforce Framework. Reference taxonomy of cybersecurity work roles, knowledge, skills, tasks.
relationToCloudSecurity: General cybersecurity guidance applicable to cloud-environment design and operations.
relationToAISecurity: Foundational cybersecurity guidance; applies to AI system implementations.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).
